role: Infrastructure configuration layer providing centralized settings management, default factories, environment overrides, and type-safe access to the ArchSpine system configuration.
responsibility: This directory implements the canonical configuration factory, file-based loading with merge logic, environment variable parsing, pre-commit hook resolution, and a unified facade for reading/writing structured configuration values like LLM provider settings, artifact strategies, and project metadata.

children.role: Infrastructure configuration factory providing the canonical default configuration for the ArchSpine system.
Infrastructure utility that normalizes boolean and positive-integer environment variable parsing for pre-commit configuration.
Centralized configuration facade for ArchSpine, providing a unified read/write API over project settings with environment overrides and policy integration.
Infrastructure configuration loader that merges default settings with user-provided overrides and loads validated SpineConfig from a JSON file path.

Low-level configuration resolver for pre-commit hook enablement within the Infra Config layer. It centralizes the decision logic between environment variable overrides and explicit configuration, providing a structured resolution result to consumers.

Abstraction layer for reading and writing supported configuration values (LLM provider, model, pre-commit, etc.). Provides a type-safe accessor interface and mapping between configuration keys and concrete accessor methods.

Configuration type definitions and re-export module for the ArchSpine configuration system. Provides canonical type shapes for boolean setting resolution, supported config keys, sync modes, and artifact strategies, and re-exports the core SpineConfig type from the protocol layer.
